validate.notes: Core validation passes: Docker builds, NOP=0, Gold=1. Rubric judge returns 0% because the judge framework is designed for PRs that modify agent config files (CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md, README.md) but this PR only modifies Helm chart YAML files. The gold solution correctly implements workers.celery.serviceAccount and workers.kubernetes.serviceAccount without needing config file changes.
